post.description: Creates a new user account and sends an email confirmation link.

get.description: Validates the confirmation token and marks the user's email as confirmed.

post.description: Resends the email confirmation link. No-op if the email is already confirmed or does not exist.

204.description: Confirmation email sent (or silently skipped if already confirmed)

post.description: Authenticates a confirmed user and returns an access + refresh token pair.
Issues a new access + refresh token pair using a valid refresh token.

401.description: Invalid, expired, or reused refresh token

post.description: Sends a password reset email. No-op if the email is not registered.

204.description: Reset email sent (or silently skipped if email not found)

post.description: Resets the user password using a valid reset token.
Revokes all active refresh tokens for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile from the JWT payload.

patch.summary: Update my channel info (name, nickname, description)

post.description: Creates a draft video and returns a presigned PUT URL for direct upload to object storage.
Marks the video as ready for processing and enqueues the FFmpeg job.

get.description: Returns paginated public videos with optional search and category filter.
Returns video details. Works for both public and unlisted videos.
Returns a presigned URL for video streaming.
Returns a presigned download URL with Content-Disposition: attachment.

post.description: Records a view for the given video.

get.description: Returns videos from the same category, ordered by view count.

patch.description: Updates title, description, or category. Owner only.

delete.description: Permanently deletes the video and its files from storage. Owner only.

post.description: Sets visibility and marks the video as published. Video must be in READY status.
Replaces the auto-generated thumbnail. Max 5MB JPEG/PNG.

get.description: Returns all videos for the authenticated user's channel (management panel).

get.summary: Get like/dislike counts for a video

post.summary: Post a comment on a video

get.summary: Get like/dislike counts for a comment
Get subscription status for a channel
List channels I am subscribed to
